summary: Completed iteration 9 testing of 7-day free Pro trial feature. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend trial UI fully functional including trial CTA, trial banner, trial widget, TRIAL badge, and start-trial button.

minor.issue: Rate limiter (20 req/15min) triggers during heavy automated testing - expected behavior, restart backend to reset

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - new users auto-get Pro trial (subscription_plan=pro, trial_used=true, trial_expires_at set)
GET /api/subscriptions/my - returns trial info (active, expires_at, days_remaining)
GET /api/subscriptions/my - returns trial_eligible flag for users who haven't used trial
GET /api/subscriptions/my - subscription shows is_trial flag for trial subscriptions
POST /api/subscriptions/start-trial - activates trial for existing users who haven't used it
POST /api/subscriptions/start-trial - rejects if trial already used ('Ai folosit deja perioada de proba gratuita')
POST /api/subscriptions/start-trial - rejects if user already has active subscription ('Ai deja un abonament activ')
Trial auto-downgrade: when trial_expires_at < now and no paid subscription, plan goes to free
Frontend: Pricing page shows 'Incearca Pro gratuit 7 zile' CTA for eligible users
Frontend: Pricing page shows trial countdown banner when trial is active
Frontend: Sidebar shows trial widget with days remaining
Frontend: Pro card shows 'TRIAL' badge when on trial
Frontend: Navbar shows PRO badge when on trial plan
Frontend: Start trial button works and shows success message
Frontend: Current plan badge shows '(Trial)' indicator
Frontend: Pro card shows '7 zile gratuit!' feature for eligible users
critical_code_review_comments: Trial feature correctly implemented - new users auto-get 7-day Pro trial at registration
Google OAuth users also get auto-trial (verified in auth.js lines 46-61)
Trial subscriptions have checkout_session_id starting with 'trial_' for identification
Auto-downgrade logic in /subscriptions/my correctly checks for expired trial and no paid subscription
Stripe remains in SIMULATED mode (sk_test_emergent only works with Python emergentintegrations)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with trial subscriptions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 trial features fully tested. Trial auto-activates for new users at registration. Existing users who never used trial see 'Incearca Pro gratuit 7 zile' CTA on pricing page. Trial auto-downgrades to Free when expired (verified via MongoDB manipulation). Stripe is SIMULATED. Rate limiter may trigger during heavy testing (20 req/15min) - restart backend to reset.

mocked_apis.Stripe payments: SIMULATED - payments created with sim_ prefix when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_emergent

features_tested.trial_auto_activation_registration: PASS - New users get Pro trial at registration
features_tested.trial_info_api: PASS - GET /subscriptions/my returns trial info with active, expires_at, days_remaining
features_tested.trial_eligible_flag: PASS - API returns trial_eligible: true for users who haven't used trial
features_tested.is_trial_flag: PASS - Subscription shows is_trial: true for trial subscriptions
features_tested.start_trial_endpoint: PASS - POST /subscriptions/start-trial activates trial for eligible users
features_tested.start_trial_rejection_already_used: PASS - Returns 400 'Ai folosit deja perioada de proba gratuita'
features_tested.start_trial_rejection_active_subscriptio: PASS - Returns 400 'Ai deja un abonament activ'
features_tested.trial_auto_downgrade: PASS - Expired trial auto-downgrades to Free when /subscriptions/my is called
features_tested.frontend_trial_cta: PASS - Shows 'Incearca Pro gratuit 7 zile' CTA for eligible users
features_tested.frontend_trial_banner: PASS - Shows countdown banner with days remaining
features_tested.frontend_trial_widget: PASS - Sidebar shows trial widget with 'PRO TRIAL' and days remaining
features_tested.frontend_trial_badge: PASS - Pro card shows 'TRIAL' badge when on trial
features_tested.frontend_navbar_pro_badge: PASS - Navbar shows 'pro' badge when on trial
features_tested.frontend_start_trial_button: PASS - Button works and shows success message
features_tested.frontend_plan_badge_trial_indicator: PASS - Shows '(Trial)' in current plan badge
